texto: Life is but a journey,if relationship and money are the passengers of that very train leading towards your destination,One thing to be kept in mind is former is far superior to achieve than the latter,Remember that latter lies even with a beggar(not by virtue of money but people) who does not realize the true value of the former
explicacao: Citação de Abhishek Sundarraman sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is but a journey,if relationship and money are the passengers of that very train leading tow…” articula reflexao, life-philosophy, money em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e dia-chuvoso.

texto: Life of a Man is Precious just as a precious stone of Diamond,Note that Diamond is evolved only when it faces the Fury of the Heat which it can't Bear,Similarly a Man's life gets Deemed as Precious only when he Boldly faces the Deep Oceans of Sorrow,Dreadfulness and Fear which He too Can't Bear,For Who Facesall these Realizes that this journey was the best part than the success of reaching the Final Destination

texto: Things don't just happen the way they happen for your its own Creator,Mentor and Destroyer
